block.header: ima nori tamapa ku kami na ki potoke no mi nori pa nemokoro naru kokoro wo moti te worogami taputwobwi matu reba kanarazu koto ni ayasi ki sirusi wo arapasi saduke tamapu mono ni imasi kyeri

sikaru ni ima arapare tamap yeru nyorai no taputwo ki opo mi syari pa tune mi maturu yori pa opo mi iro mo pikari teri te ito urupasi ku opo mi katati mo tarapi te koto ni yo ku opo masi maseba koto ni kususi ku ayasi ki koto wo omopi pakaru koto kipamarite kata si

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,4@余利波大御色毛光照天甚美久,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,6@別好久大末之末世波特尔,*

block.header: koko wo motite kokoro no uti ni piru mo yworu mo umi okotaru koto na ku tutusi mi uya mapi tukape maturi tutu pabe ri
kore makoto ni kari no opo mi mwi pa en ni sitagapi te watasi mitibiki tamapu ni pa toki wo sugusa zu okonapi ni api kotape te utukusi bwi sukupi tamapu to ipu koto ni aru rasi to namo omopo su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,1@大御身波縁尔随天度導賜尔波時乎不過,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,4@言尔在良之止奈毛念湏,*

block.header: napo si nori wo okosi sakaye simuru ni pa pito ni yorite tugi piroparu mono ni ari

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@猶之法乎興隆之牟流尔波人尔依天継比呂牟流,*

block.header: kare moro moro no dai pousi tati wo piki wi te kami to imasu dai zyau dai zin zen zi no kotowari no goto ku susume okona pa sime wosipe mitibiki tamapu ni yori te si ka ku ayasi ku taputwo ki sirusi pa arapasi tama p yeri

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@故諸乃大法師等乎比岐為天,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,PP-GEN,NP,2@太政大臣禅師乃如理久勧行波之米教導賜尔依天之,*

block.header: sikaru ni ko no taputwo ku uresi ki koto wo ware pito ri nomwi ya yorokobwi mu to omoposi te namo opo maturi goto no opo mapye tu kimi wa ga daisi ni popuwau no kurawi saduke matur aku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,4@太政大臣朕大師尔法王乃位授末都良久止勅,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,5@天皇御命乎諸聞食止宣,*

block.header: mata nori tamapa ku ko no yo no naka no kurawi woba negapi motome tabu koto pa katu te na ku pito tu no miti ni kokoro zasi te bosati no gyau wo okona pi pito wo watasi mitibika mu to ipu ni kokoro pa sadame te imasu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@復勅久此乃世間乃位乎波楽求多布,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@3,NP,IP-REL,5@止云尔心波定天伊末湏,*

block.header: kaku pa aredomo napo wa ga uyamapi mukui maturu waza to site namo ko no kurawi kagapuri wo saduke matur aku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,3@此乃位冠乎授末川良久止勅,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,4@天皇我御命乎諸聞食止宣,*

block.header: tugi ni moro moro no dai popusi ga naka ni mo ko no puta ri no zen zi tati i oyazi kokoro wo moti te api sitagapi miti wo kokoro zasi te yo no naka no kurawi kagapuri woba negapa zu imasape domo namo napo yamu koto wo e zu te enkou zen zi ni popu sin no kurawi saduke maturu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@次尔諸大法師可中仁毛此二禅師等伊同心乎以天相従,*
IP-MAT,5@円興禅師尔法臣位授末川流,*

block.header: kwi sin zen zi ni popu sangi dai ritu si to site kagapuri pa opo ki yo tu no kurawi no kami tu sina wo sadu ke mata mononobye no kiywo si no asomi to ipu kabane wo saduke maturu to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,0@基真禅師尔法参議大律師止之天,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,4@天皇我御命乎諸聞食止宣,*

block.header: mata nori tamapa ku ko no tera pa wa ga papa kata no opo di saki no opo maturi goto no opo mapye tu kimi pudi para no opo mapye tu kimi no ipye ni ari

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@此寺方朕外祖父先乃太政大臣藤原大臣之家仁在,*

block.header: ima so no ipye no na wo tugi te akira ka ni kiywo ki kokoro wo moti te mikadwo wo tasuke matu ri tukape matu ru migi no opo mapye tu kimi pudi para no asomi woba pidari no opo mapye tu kimi no kurawi saduke tama pi wosame tamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,4@右大臣藤原朝臣遠波左大臣乃位授賜比治賜,*

block.header: mata kibwi no asomi pa wa ga pi tugi no mi kwo to ima si si toki yori mi pumi yomi to site wosipe satosi kyeru amata no tosi pe nu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@復吉備朝臣波朕我太子等坐之之,*
IP-MAT,NP,1@時余利師等之天教悟家留,*

block.header: ima pa mwi mo ape zu aru ramu mono wo yworu piru makara zu site mamori tasuke tukape maturu wo mi reba katazikena mi namo omopo su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@今方身毛不敢阿流良牟,*
IP-MAT,PP,NP,1@物乎夜昼不退之天護助奉侍遠見礼波可多自気奈弥奈毛念湏,*

block.header: sikaru ni pito to site megumi wo sira zu megumi wo mukui nu woba piziri no mi nori ni mo isame tama p yeru mono ni ari

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@3,NP,IP-REL,PP,NP,IP-REL,2@恩乎不報奴乎波聖乃御法仁毛禁給弊流,*

block.header: koko wo moti te kibwi no asomi ni migi no opo mapye tu kimi no kurawi saduke tamapu to noritama pu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@是以天吉備朝臣仁右大臣之位授賜止勅布,*
